subject: refactor(debug): extract PwaDiagnosticsTab + shared debugPalette
body:
DebugPill.tsx was at 613 lines and mixing four concerns: the pill
shell (collapsed + expanded), log-row rendering, env-tab rendering,
and the whole PWA diagnostics sub-tab (component + async runPwaDiagnostics
+ DiagLine type). The PWA surface is self-contained, web-only, and
conceptually separate — clean extraction candidate.

- New: src/debug/PwaDiagnosticsTab.tsx — component + async diagnostic
  runner + DiagLine type + its own StyleSheet. Defensively re-gates
  on Platform.OS === 'web' inside the runner so a future caller
  can't accidentally hit window / navigator on native.
- New: src/debug/debugPalette.ts — extracted C / SEVERITY / SOURCE /
  monoIfWeb from DebugPill.tsx so PwaDiagnosticsTab can reuse them
  without duplication. Typed against DebugSeverity / DebugSource
  from debugLog.
- DebugPill.tsx imports both; removed the inline PwaDiagnosticsTab,
  runPwaDiagnostics, DiagLine, palette constants, and the now-unused
  pwaList / pwaLine StyleSheet entries.

Line counts:
  Before: DebugPill.tsx 613.
  After:  DebugPill.tsx 466, PwaDiagnosticsTab.tsx 138,
          debugPalette.ts 50.

DebugPill.tsx is now under the 500-line "consider extraction"
threshold from CLAUDE.md code standards.

CLAUDE.md architecture section updated with both new files.

No behaviour change. tsc 0, jest 83/83, expo web build clean.

Tags: debug, refactor, modularity
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch
